package_info.description: A1 level English-Turkish vocabulary - Basic everyday words

example.en: I have two cats at home.
She is wearing a red dress.
My father works in a school.
I eat an apple for breakfast.
She eats two eggs every morning.
The dog has a big nose.
I read a book every night.
The food is on the table.
My phone is on the table.
I sleep eight hours a night.
I go to school every day.
They live in a big house.
Good morning! Did you sleep well?
The weather is very hot today.
I have four cats at home.
She has five fingers on each hand.
There are six apples on the table.
There are seven days in a week.
I wake up at eight o'clock.
The sun is yellow and bright.
She is wearing an orange shirt.
The flowers are pink and beautiful.
The baby is sleeping in the room.
My son goes to school every day.
I eat bread and cheese for breakfast.
We eat rice for dinner tonight.
example.tr: Bu gece akşam yemeğinde pirinç yiyoruz.

example.en: The soup is hot and tasty.
Would you like a cup of tea?
Do you want sugar in your tea?
She has a pain in her ear.
He broke his leg playing football.
Please open the window, it is hot.
I go to bed at ten o'clock.
My bag is on the chair.
The clock on the wall is old.
She drank a cup of coffee.
I walk to school every morning.
The children run in the park.
Can you open the door please?
Please close the window at night.
The old man sits by the window.
She is a young and smart student.
example.tr: O genç ve zeki bir öğrenci.

example.en: She is short but very strong.
example.tr: O kısa boylu ama çok güçlü.

example.en: Good afternoon, welcome to our school.
example.tr: İyi öğleden sonralar, okulumza hoş geldiniz.

example.en: Excuse me, where is the bank?
The score is zero to zero.
There are a hundred students here.
My cousin is eight years old.
I eat a banana every morning.
I put tomato in my salad.
I put butter on my bread.
She hurt her knee playing football.
My father has a red car.
I go to school every day.
I dry my hands with a towel.
I read a book every night.
She writes a letter to her friend.
I listen to music every day.
I want to buy a new bag.
example.tr: Yeni bir çanta satın almak istiyorum.

example.en: I want a glass of water.
The room is clean and nice.
The cat is sleeping on the bed.
A bird is sitting on the tree.
The horse is big and strong.
She has a beautiful red flower.
example.tr: Onun güzel bir kırmızı çiçeği var.

example.en: There is a big tree in the garden.
The sun is very bright today.
The moon is bright at night.
There is a lot of rain today.
Children love to play in snow.
I live in a big city.
We walk in the park every day.
My mother works at the hospital.
I go to the shop for bread.
We eat dinner at the restaurant.
I buy vegetables at the market.
The road to school is long.
These grapes are sweet and delicious.
She loves eating strawberries with cream.
We eat cake on my birthday.
Mom made chocolate cookies for us.
example.tr: Annem bizim için çikolatalı kurabiye yaptı.

example.en: He is wearing a white shirt.
These trousers are too big for me.
I need new shoes for school.
example.tr: Okul için yeni ayakkabıya ihtiyacım var.

example.en: She wears a beautiful blue dress.
He wears a hat in the sun.
Put on your coat, it is cold.
I cannot find my clean socks.
Can you help me with this?
example.tr: Bu konuda bana yardım edebilir misin?

example.en: I like ice cream very much.
I have two brothers and one sister.
example.tr: İki erkek ve bir kız kardeşim var.

example.en: My mother cooks dinner every evening.
example.tr: Annem her akşam akşam yemeği pişirir.

example.en: Please wash your hands before eating.
I love my family very much.
I make my bed every morning.
The glass is full of water.
Please be quiet in the library.
There are thirty students in the class.
My father is forty years old.
